commit_message: Fixup environment Fixup environment This PR updates the build flow with more hooks for setting build variables, as well as an all-in-one 'make prep' flow. It also fixes a bug where we try to build with ARM NEON on the x86 machine and cleans up a few RTL warnings

examples.commit_message: Fixup environment Fixup environment This PR updates the build flow with more hooks for setting build variables, as well as an all-in-one 'make prep' flow. It also fixes a bug where we try to build with ARM NEON on the x86 machine and cleans up a few RTL warnings
examples.before_code:
TOP  := $(shell git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
CURR := $(shell pwd)

#############################
# Project Settings
#############################
export PART       ?= xc7z020clg400-1
export TOP_MODULE ?= top
export BASENAME   ?= blackparrot

#############################
# Accelerator Software Settings
#############################
export NBF_FILE     ?= $(abspath ../hello_world.nbf)
export HOST_PROGRAM ?= $(abspath ../ps.cpp)
export BASE_FLIST   ?= $(abspath ../flist.vcs)
export FLIST        ?= $(abspath flist.vcs)
export SIM_ARGS     += $(NBF_FILE)
export SIM_DEFINES  += -DFPGA

#SIM_DEFINES  +=-DSKIP_DRAM_TESTING

CFLAGS += -DZYNQ_PS_DEBUG
CFLAGS += -DGP0_ENABLE -DGP0_ADDR_BASE=0x40000000 -DGP0_ADDR_WIDTH=6
CFLAGS += -DGP0_ADDR_SIZE_BYTES=4096 -DGP0_DATA_WIDTH=32
CFLAGS += -DGP1_ENABLE -DGP1_ADDR_BASE=0x80000000 -DGP1_ADDR_WIDTH=30
CFLAGS += -DGP1_ADDR_SIZE_BYTES=0x30000000 -DGP1_DATA_WIDTH=32

include $(TOP)/cosim/mk/Makefile.fpga

#############################
# Modify base flist
#############################
$(FLIST): $(BLACKPARROT_DIR)/bp_top/syn/flist.vcs $(BASE_FLIST)
	cat $^ | envsubst > $@
	echo "+incdir+$(CURR_SRC_DIR)" >> $@
	echo "+incdir+$(COSIM_DIR)/include/fpga" >> $@
	# Replace hardened memory which is incorrectly inferred on some Xilinx FPGAs
	sed -i "/bsg_mem_1rw_sync_mask_write_bit.v/d" $@
	sed -i "/bsg_mem_1rw_sync_mask_write_bit_synth.v/d" $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/hard/ultrascale_plus/bsg_mem/bsg_mem_1rw_sync_mask_write_bit.v" >> $@

export SIM_DEFINES  += -DFPGA

#SIM_DEFINES  +=-DSKIP_DRAM_TESTING

CFLAGS += -DZYNQ_PS_DEBUG
CFLAGS += -DGP0_ENABLE -DGP0_ADDR_BASE=0x40000000 -DGP0_ADDR_WIDTH=6

CFLAGS += -DGP1_ENABLE -DGP1_ADDR_BASE=0x80000000 -DGP1_ADDR_WIDTH=30
CFLAGS += -DGP1_ADDR_SIZE_BYTES=0x30000000 -DGP1_DATA_WIDTH=32

#############################

	cat $^ | envsubst > $@

	# Replace hardened memory which is incorrectly inferred on some Xilinx FPGAs

examples.commit_message: Fixup environment Fixup environment This PR updates the build flow with more hooks for setting build variables, as well as an all-in-one 'make prep' flow. It also fixes a bug where we try to build with ARM NEON on the x86 machine and cleans up a few RTL warnings
examples.before_code:
TOP  := $(shell git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
CURR := $(shell pwd)

#############################
# Project Settings
#############################
export TOP_MODULE ?= top

#############################
# Accelerator Software Settings
#############################
export NBF_FILE     ?= $(abspath ../hello_world.nbf)
export HOST_PROGRAM ?= $(abspath ../ps.cpp)
export BASE_FLIST   ?= $(abspath ../flist.vcs)
export FLIST        ?= $(abspath flist.vcs)
export SIM_ARGS     += +c_args=$(NBF_FILE)
export SIM_DEFINES  += -DVERILATOR

SKIP_DRAM ?= -DSKIP_DRAM_TESTING
BP_NCPUS ?= 1

#CFLAGS += -DZYNQ_PL_DEBUG
CFLAGS += -DZYNQ_PS_DEBUG
CFLAGS += -DGP0_ENABLE -DGP0_ADDR_BASE=0x40000000U -DGP0_ADDR_WIDTH=6 -DGP0_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DGP0_HIER_BASE=top.axil0
CFLAGS += -DGP1_ENABLE -DGP1_ADDR_BASE=0x80000000U -DGP1_ADDR_WIDTH=30 -DGP1_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DGP1_HIER_BASE=top.axil1
CFLAGS += -DHP0_ENABLE -DHP0_ADDR_BASE=0x1000000U -DHP0_ADDR_WIDTH=32 -DHP0_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DHP0_HIER_BASE=top.axil2
CFLAGS += -DSCRATCHPAD_ENABLE
CFLAGS += -DBP_NCPUS=$(BP_NCPUS)
# Enable backpressure
#CFLAGS += -DSIM_BACKPRESSURE_ENABLE
#CFLAGS += -DSIM_BACKPRESSURE_CHANCE=5
#CFLAGS += -DSIM_BACKPRESSURE_LENGTH=100
CFLAGS += $(INCLUDES) $(SKIP_DRAM)

include $(TOP)/cosim/mk/Makefile.vcs

#############################
# Modify base flist
#############################
$(FLIST): $(BLACKPARROT_DIR)/bp_top/syn/flist.vcs $(BASE_FLIST)
	cat $^ | envsubst > $@
	echo "+incdir+$(CURR_SRC_DIR)" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_clock_gen.v" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_reset_gen.v" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_axi_mem.v" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_clock_gen.cpp" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_clock_gen.v " >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_gpio.v " >> $@
	echo "$(COSIM_SRC_DIR)/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_to_axil.v" >> $@
	echo "$(COSIM_SRC_DIR)/bsg_nonsynth_axil_to_dpi.v" >> $@
examples.after_code:
TOP  := $(shell git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
CURR := $(shell pwd)

export BASE_FLIST   ?= $(abspath ../flist.vcs)
export FLIST        ?= $(abspath flist.vcs)
export SIM_ARGS     += +c_args=$(NBF_FILE)
export SIM_DEFINES  += -DVERILATOR

SKIP_DRAM ?= -DSKIP_DRAM_TESTING
BP_NCPUS ?= 1

#CFLAGS += -DZYNQ_PL_DEBUG
CFLAGS += -DZYNQ_PS_DEBUG
CFLAGS += -DGP0_ENABLE -DGP0_ADDR_BASE=0x40000000U -DGP0_ADDR_WIDTH=6 -DGP0_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DGP0_HIER_BASE=top.axil0
CFLAGS += -DGP1_ENABLE -DGP1_ADDR_BASE=0x80000000U -DGP1_ADDR_WIDTH=30 -DGP1_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DGP1_HIER_BASE=top.axil1
CFLAGS += -DHP0_ENABLE -DHP0_ADDR_BASE=0x1000000U -DHP0_ADDR_WIDTH=32 -DHP0_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DHP0_HIER_BASE=top.axil2
CFLAGS += -DSCRATCHPAD_ENABLE
CFLAGS += -DBP_NCPUS=$(BP_NCPUS)
# Enable backpressure
#CFLAGS += -DSIM_BACKPRESSURE_ENABLE
#CFLAGS += -DSIM_BACKPRESSURE_CHANCE=5
#CFLAGS += -DSIM_BACKPRESSURE_LENGTH=100
CFLAGS += $(INCLUDES) $(SKIP_DRAM)

include $(TOP)/cosim/mk/Makefile.vcs

#############################
# Modify base flist
#############################
$(FLIST): $(BLACKPARROT_DIR)/bp_top/syn/flist.vcs $(BASE_FLIST)
	cat $^ | envsubst > $@
	echo "+incdir+$(CURR_SRC_DIR)" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_clock_gen.v" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_reset_gen.v" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_axi_mem.v" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_clock_gen.cpp" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_clock_gen.v " >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_gpio.v " >> $@
	echo "$(COSIM_SRC_DIR)/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_to_axil.v" >> $@
	echo "$(COSIM_SRC_DIR)/bsg_nonsynth_axil_to_dpi.v" >> $@

examples.before_code:
TOP  := $(shell git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
CURR := $(shell pwd)

#############################
# Project Settings
#############################
export TOP_MODULE ?= top

#############################
# Accelerator Software Settings
#############################
export NBF_FILE     ?= $(abspath ../hello_world.nbf)
export HOST_PROGRAM ?= $(abspath ../ps.cpp)
export BASE_FLIST   ?= $(abspath ../flist.vcs)
export FLIST        ?= $(abspath flist.vcs)
export SIM_ARGS     += $(NBF_FILE)
export SIM_DEFINES  += -DVERILATOR

SKIP_DRAM ?= -DSKIP_DRAM_TESTING
BP_NCPUS ?= 1

#CFLAGS += -DZYNQ_PL_DEBUG
CFLAGS += -DZYNQ_PS_DEBUG
CFLAGS += -DGP0_ENABLE -DGP0_ADDR_BASE=0x40000000U -DGP0_ADDR_WIDTH=6 -DGP0_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DGP0_HIER_BASE=TOP.top.axil0
CFLAGS += -DGP1_ENABLE -DGP1_ADDR_BASE=0x80000000U -DGP1_ADDR_WIDTH=30 -DGP1_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DGP1_HIER_BASE=TOP.top.axil1
CFLAGS += -DHP0_ENABLE -DHP0_ADDR_BASE=0x1000000U -DHP0_ADDR_WIDTH=32 -DHP0_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DHP0_HIER_BASE=TOP.top.axil2
CFLAGS += -DSCRATCHPAD_ENABLE
CFLAGS += -DBP_NCPUS=$(BP_NCPUS)
CFLAGS += $(INCLUDES) $(SKIP_DRAM)
# Enable backpressure
#CFLAGS += -DSIM_BACKPRESSURE_ENABLE
#CFLAGS += -DSIM_BACKPRESSURE_CHANCE=5
#CFLAGS += -DSIM_BACKPRESSURE_LENGTH=100

include $(TOP)/cosim/mk/Makefile.verilator

#############################
# Modify base flist
#############################
$(FLIST): $(BLACKPARROT_DIR)/bp_top/syn/flist.vcs $(BASE_FLIST)
	cat $^ | envsubst > $@
	echo "+incdir+$(CURR_SRC_DIR)" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_clock_gen.cpp" >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_clock_gen.v " >> $@
	echo "$(BASEJUMP_STL_DIR)/bsg_test/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_gpio.v " >> $@
	echo "$(COSIM_SRC_DIR)/bsg_nonsynth_dpi_to_axil.v" >> $@
	echo "$(COSIM_SRC_DIR)/bsg_nonsynth_axil_to_dpi.v" >> $@

CURR := $(shell pwd)

examples.commit_message: Fixup environment Fixup environment This PR updates the build flow with more hooks for setting build variables, as well as an all-in-one 'make prep' flow. It also fixes a bug where we try to build with ARM NEON on the x86 machine and cleans up a few RTL warnings
examples.patch:
@@ -162,6 +162,7 @@ module top #
 `endif
 
    localparam num_regs_ps_to_pl_lp = 2;
+   localparam num_regs_pl_to_ps_lp = 2;
 
    // this module currently only valid if these are equal
    localparam num_fifo_ps_to_pl_lp = 1;
@@ -175,12 +176,13 @@ module top #
    wire [1:0][num_fifo_ps_to_pl_lp-1:0]                           ps_to_pl_fifo_v_lo;
    wire [1:0][num_fifo_ps_to_pl_lp-1:0]                           ps_to_pl_fifo_yumi_li;
 
-   wire [1:0][num_regs_ps_to_pl_lp-1:0][C_S00_AXI_DATA_WIDTH-1:0] csr_data_li, csr_data_lo;
+   wire [1:0][num_regs_ps_to_pl_lp-1:0][C_S00_AXI_DATA_WIDTH-1:0] csr_data_lo;
 
 
    bsg_zynq_pl_shell
      #(
        .num_regs_ps_to_pl_p(num_regs_ps_to_pl_lp)
+       ,.num_regs_pl_to_ps_p(num_regs_pl_to_ps_lp)
        ,.num_fifo_ps_to_pl_p(num_fifo_ps_to_pl_lp)
        ,.num_fifo_pl_to_ps_p(num_fifo_pl_to_ps_lp)
        ,.C_S_AXI_DATA_WIDTH(C_S00_AXI_DATA_WIDTH)
@@ -196,7 +198,7 @@ module top #
         ,.ps_to_pl_fifo_yumi_i (ps_to_pl_fifo_yumi_li [0])
 
         ,.csr_data_o(csr_data_lo[0])
-        ,.csr_data_i(csr_data_li)
+        ,.csr_data_i(csr_data_lo[1])
 
         ,.S_AXI_ACLK   (s00_axi_aclk   )
         ,.S_AXI_ARESETN(s00_axi_aresetn)
@@ -224,6 +226,7 @@ module top #
    bsg_zynq_pl_shell
      #(
        .num_regs_ps_to_pl_p(num_regs_ps_to_pl_lp)
+       ,.num_regs_pl_to_ps_p(num_regs_pl_to_ps_lp)
        ,.num_fifo_ps_to_pl_p(num_fifo_ps_to_pl_lp)
        ,.num_fifo_pl_to_ps_p(num_fifo_pl_to_ps_lp)
        ,.C_S_AXI_DATA_WIDTH(C_S01_AXI_DATA_WIDTH)
@@ -239,7 +242,7 @@ module top #
         ,.ps_to_pl_fifo_yumi_i (ps_to_pl_fifo_yumi_li [1])
 
         ,.csr_data_o(csr_data_lo[1])
-        ,.csr_data_i(csr_data_li)
+        ,.csr_data_i(csr_data_lo[0])
 
         ,.S_AXI_ACLK   (s01_axi_aclk   )
         ,.S_AXI_ARESETN(s01_axi_aresetn)

examples.commit_message: Fixup environment Fixup environment This PR updates the build flow with more hooks for setting build variables, as well as an all-in-one 'make prep' flow. It also fixes a bug where we try to build with ARM NEON on the x86 machine and cleans up a few RTL warnings
examples.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,6 @@ export PART       ?= xc7z020clg400-1
 export TOP_MODULE ?= top
 export BASENAME   ?= shell
 
-
 #############################
 # Accelerator Software Settings
 #############################
examples.before_code:
TOP   := $(shell git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
CURR  := $(shell pwd)

#############################
# Project Settings
#############################
export PART       ?= xc7z020clg400-1
export TOP_MODULE ?= top
export BASENAME   ?= shell


#############################
# Accelerator Software Settings
#############################
HOST_PROGRAM ?= $(abspath ../ps.cpp)
BASE_FLIST   ?= $(abspath ../flist.vcs)
FLIST        ?= $(abspath flist.vcs)
export SIM_DEFINES  += -DFPGA

CFLAGS += -DZYNQ_PS_DEBUG -mfpu=neon
CFLAGS += -DGP0_ENABLE -DGP0_ADDR_BASE=0x40000000 -DGP0_ADDR_WIDTH=6 -DGP0_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DGP0_ADDR_SIZE_BYTES=4096
CFLAGS += -DGP1_ENABLE -DGP1_ADDR_BASE=0x80000000 -DGP1_ADDR_WIDTH=6 -DGP1_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DGP1_ADDR_SIZE_BYTES=4096

include $(TOP)/cosim/mk/Makefile.fpga

#############################
# Modify base flist
#############################
$(FLIST): $(BASE_FLIST)
	cat $< | envsubst > $@
	echo "+incdir+$(COSIM_DIR)/include/fpga" >> $@
examples.after_code:

CURR  := $(shell pwd)

#############################

export TOP_MODULE ?= top

#############################

#############################

CFLAGS += -DGP1_ENABLE -DGP1_ADDR_BASE=0x80000000 -DGP1_ADDR_WIDTH=6 -DGP1_DATA_WIDTH=32 -DGP1_ADDR_SIZE_BYTES=4096

include $(TOP)/cosim/mk/Makefile.fpga

#############################
# Modify base flist
#############################
$(FLIST): $(BASE_FLIST)
	cat $< | envsubst > $@
	echo "+incdir+$(COSIM_DIR)/include/fpga" >> $@

examples.commit_message: Fixup environment Fixup environment This PR updates the build flow with more hooks for setting build variables, as well as an all-in-one 'make prep' flow. It also fixes a bug where we try to build with ARM NEON on the x86 machine and cleans up a few RTL warnings
examples.patch:
@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ checkout_tools:
 
 #build once (x86 server); takes about 15 minutes
 build_tools: checkout_tools
-	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) panic_room PLATFORM=zynqparrot
+	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) panic_room
 
 # run on x86
 build_libs: build_tools
examples.before_code:
SDK_DIR=../cosim/import/black-parrot-sdk
NBF_DIR=../cosim/import/black-parrot/bp_common/software/py

NBF_NCPUS ?= 1

SUITE ?= beebs

export PATH := $(SDK_DIR)/install/bin/:$(PATH)
CROSS_COMPILE ?= riscv64-unknown-elf-dramfs-
RISCV_OBJCOPY ?= $(CROSS_COMPILE)objcopy
SED ?= sed

suite-binaries:=$(shell test -d $(SDK_DIR)/prog/$(SUITE) && find $(SDK_DIR)/prog/$(SUITE) -iname "*.riscv")

checkout_tools:
	cd ../cosim/import; git submodule update --init black-parrot-sdk

#build once (x86 server); takes about 15 minutes
build_tools: checkout_tools
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) panic_room PLATFORM=zynqparrot

# run on x86
build_libs: build_tools
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init bedrock
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 bedrock
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init perch
	$(MAKE)  -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 perch
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init bootrom
	$(MAKE)  -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 bootrom

# run on x86
# build these after you build the tools (x86 server)
build_beebs: build_libs
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init beebs
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) beebs

# run on x86
# build riscv binaries for $(SUITE) benchmark in SDK
build_suite: build_libs
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init $(SUITE)
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 $(SUITE)

# run on x86
#generates NBF files for $(SUITE) benchmarks at nbf/$(SUITE)
generate_nbf: build_libs $(suite-binaries:.riscv=.nbf)
	mkdir -p nbf/$(SUITE)
	-mv $(filter-out $<,$^) nbf/$(SUITE)

# run on x86 server
# needs access to spec2000-private and spec2006-private
build_spec: build_libs
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init spec2000
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init spec2006
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init spec2017
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 spec2000
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 spec2006
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 spec2017

# run on x86 server
clean_software:
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/bedrock.*
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/bootrom.*
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/perch.*
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/beebs.*
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/spec2000.*
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/spec2006.*
	-$(MAKE) -C ../cosim/import/fpga clean
	-$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) prog_clean
	-$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) tidy_progs
	-rm -rf nbf

# run on x86 server
clean_nbfs:
	-rm -rf nbf

#
# before you load the bitstream, be sure to copy the .b64 file to ../cosim/black-parrot-example
# on the zynq board and run the unpack_bitstream make rule there
#

# do this the first time you try to run after you have rebooted the Zynq, before the bitstream has been loaded
# run on Zynq
load_bitstream:
	$(MAKE) -C ../cosim/black-parrot-example/fpga load_bitstream

# do this if you have already used the bitstream; it transfers over the pointer to the DRAM address space
# run on Zynq
reload_bitstream_keep_dram:
	$(MAKE) -C ../cosim/black-parrot-example/fpga reload_bitstream_keep_dram

# run on Zynq
summarize:
	grep --files-without-match PASS nbf/*.log
	grep FAIL nbf/*.log

# run on Zynq or X86
clean_logs:
	rm -rf nbf/*.log

# run on x86
VPATH := $(wildcard ../cosim/import/black-parrot-sdk/prog/*)
%.nbf: %.riscv
	$(RISCV_OBJCOPY) -O verilog $< $*.mem
	$(SED) -i "s/@8/@0/g" $*.mem
	python $(NBF_DIR)/nbf.py --skip_zeros --config --boot_pc 0x80000000 --mem $*.mem --ncpus $(NBF_NCPUS) > $@
	-rm $*.mem

# if you want to run one test, then you can do:

# make nbf/<testname>.fpga.log to run on fpga (Zynq)


%.fpga.log: %.nbf
	$(MAKE) -C ../cosim/black-parrot-example/fpga run NBF_FILE=$(abspath $<) | tee -i $*.fpga.log

%.fpga.rerun: %.nbf
	-rm $*.fpga.log
	make $*.fpga.log

# make nbf/<testname>.verilator.log to run on verilator (probably x86)

%.verilator.log: %.nbf
	$(MAKE) FREE_DRAM=0 -C ../cosim/black-parrot-example/verilator run NBF_FILE=$(abspath $<) | tee -i $*.verilator.log

%.verilator.rerun: %.nbf
	-rm $*.verilator.log
	make $*.verilator.log

# make nbf/<testname>.vcs.log to run on vcs (probably x86)

%.vcs.log: %.nbf
	$(MAKE) FREE_DRAM=0 -C ../cosim/black-parrot-example/vcs run NBF_FILE=$(abspath $<) | tee -i $*.vcs.log

%.vcs.rerun: %.nbf
	-rm $*.vcs.log
	make $*.vcs.log
examples.after_code:
SDK_DIR=../cosim/import/black-parrot-sdk
NBF_DIR=../cosim/import/black-parrot/bp_common/software/py

NBF_NCPUS ?= 1

SUITE ?= beebs

export PATH := $(SDK_DIR)/install/bin/:$(PATH)
CROSS_COMPILE ?= riscv64-unknown-elf-dramfs-
RISCV_OBJCOPY ?= $(CROSS_COMPILE)objcopy
SED ?= sed

suite-binaries:=$(shell test -d $(SDK_DIR)/prog/$(SUITE) && find $(SDK_DIR)/prog/$(SUITE) -iname "*.riscv")

checkout_tools:
	cd ../cosim/import; git submodule update --init black-parrot-sdk

#build once (x86 server); takes about 15 minutes
build_tools: checkout_tools
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) panic_room

# run on x86
build_libs: build_tools
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init bedrock
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 bedrock
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init perch
	$(MAKE)  -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 perch
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init bootrom
	$(MAKE)  -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 bootrom

# run on x86
# build these after you build the tools (x86 server)
build_beebs: build_libs
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init beebs
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) beebs

# run on x86
# build riscv binaries for $(SUITE) benchmark in SDK
build_suite: build_libs
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init $(SUITE)
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 $(SUITE)

# run on x86
#generates NBF files for $(SUITE) benchmarks at nbf/$(SUITE)
generate_nbf: build_libs $(suite-binaries:.riscv=.nbf)
	mkdir -p nbf/$(SUITE)
	-mv $(filter-out $<,$^) nbf/$(SUITE)

# run on x86 server
# needs access to spec2000-private and spec2006-private
build_spec: build_libs
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init spec2000
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init spec2006
	cd $(SDK_DIR); git submodule update --init spec2017
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 spec2000
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 spec2006
	$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) -j1 spec2017

# run on x86 server
clean_software:
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/bedrock.*
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/bootrom.*
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/perch.*
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/beebs.*
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/spec2000.*
	-rm -rf $(SDK_DIR)/install/touchfiles/prog/spec2006.*
	-$(MAKE) -C ../cosim/import/fpga clean
	-$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) prog_clean
	-$(MAKE) -C $(SDK_DIR) tidy_progs
	-rm -rf nbf

# run on x86 server
clean_nbfs:
	-rm -rf nbf

#
# before you load the bitstream, be sure to copy the .b64 file to ../cosim/black-parrot-example
# on the zynq board and run the unpack_bitstream make rule there
#

# do this the first time you try to run after you have rebooted the Zynq, before the bitstream has been loaded
# run on Zynq
load_bitstream:
	$(MAKE) -C ../cosim/black-parrot-example/fpga load_bitstream

# do this if you have already used the bitstream; it transfers over the pointer to the DRAM address space
# run on Zynq
reload_bitstream_keep_dram:
	$(MAKE) -C ../cosim/black-parrot-example/fpga reload_bitstream_keep_dram

# run on Zynq
summarize:
	grep --files-without-match PASS nbf/*.log
	grep FAIL nbf/*.log

# run on Zynq or X86
clean_logs:
	rm -rf nbf/*.log

# run on x86
VPATH := $(wildcard ../cosim/import/black-parrot-sdk/prog/*)
%.nbf: %.riscv
	$(RISCV_OBJCOPY) -O verilog $< $*.mem
	$(SED) -i "s/@8/@0/g" $*.mem
	python $(NBF_DIR)/nbf.py --skip_zeros --config --boot_pc 0x80000000 --mem $*.mem --ncpus $(NBF_NCPUS) > $@
	-rm $*.mem

%.fpga.log: %.nbf
	$(MAKE) -C ../cosim/black-parrot-example/fpga run NBF_FILE=$(abspath $<) | tee -i $*.fpga.log

%.fpga.rerun: %.nbf
	-rm $*.fpga.log
	make $*.fpga.log

# make nbf/<testname>.verilator.log to run on verilator (probably x86)

%.verilator.log: %.nbf
	$(MAKE) FREE_DRAM=0 -C ../cosim/black-parrot-example/verilator run NBF_FILE=$(abspath $<) | tee -i $*.verilator.log
